title: teucrium pumilum subsp. floccosum
intro: Teucrium pumilum subsp. floccosum, also known as the woolly germander or woolly teucrium, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant compounds that may help to soothe digestive issues and protect against infections. The health benefits of Teucrium pumilum subsp. floccosum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve symptoms associated with conditions such as irritable bowel syndrome, as well as its ability to support immune function and protect against cell damage. Teucrium pumilum subsp. floccosum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and health.
